name: @aily-project/lib-seeed-9dof
author: Seeed Studio
description: Grove IMU 9DOF(ICM20600+AK09918) Blockly库，支持加速度、陀螺仪、磁力计和航向角读取。
description_zh_cn: Grove IMU 9DOF(ICM20600+AK09918) Blockly库，支持加速度、陀螺仪、磁力计和航向角读取。
description_en: Blockly wrapper for Grove IMU 9DOF (ICM20600 + AK09918), with accelerometer, gyroscope, magnetometer and heading blocks.
